description: Istio service mesh dashboard for Istio, Envoy, Pilot, Citadel, Galley, and Kubernetes resource metrics collected in SigNoz.
title: Istio Monitoring Dashboard

var-deployment-environment.description: Optional deployment environment. Included for compatibility; not wired because the live Istio metrics did not expose this field.
var-deployment-environment.name: deployment.environment

var-namespace.description: Kubernetes namespace for Istio telemetry and resource metrics.
var-namespace.name: namespace

var-service-name.description: Destination service name observed in Istio standard metrics.
var-service-name.name: service.name

widgets.description: Total Istio HTTP requests over the selected time range.

filter.expression: reporter = 'destination' AND k8s.namespace.name IN $namespace AND service.name IN $service.name AND destination_cluster IN $cluster

widgets.title: Total Requests

widgets.description: Average request rate per second.

filter.expression: reporter = 'destination' AND k8s.namespace.name IN $namespace AND service.name IN $service.name AND destination_cluster IN $cluster

widgets.title: Request Rate

widgets.description: Average request latency from Istio duration sum/count.

filter.expression: reporter = 'destination' AND k8s.namespace.name IN $namespace AND service.name IN $service.name AND destination_cluster IN $cluster
reporter = 'destination' AND k8s.namespace.name IN $namespace AND service.name IN $service.name AND destination_cluster IN $cluster

widgets.title: Average Latency

widgets.description: HTTP 4xx/5xx request percentage.

filter.expression: reporter = 'destination' AND response_code REGEXP '^[45][0-9][0-9]$' AND k8s.namespace.name IN $namespace AND service.name IN $service.name AND destination_cluster IN $cluster
reporter = 'destination' AND k8s.namespace.name IN $namespace AND service.name IN $service.name AND destination_cluster IN $cluster

widgets.title: Error Rate

widgets.description: Request rate grouped by destination service.

filter.expression: reporter = 'destination' AND destination_service_name EXISTS AND k8s.namespace.name IN $namespace AND service.name IN $service.name AND destination_cluster IN $cluster

widgets.title: Request Rate by Destination Service

widgets.description: P95 request latency by destination service.

filter.expression: reporter = 'destination' AND destination_service_name EXISTS AND k8s.namespace.name IN $namespace AND service.name IN $service.name AND destination_cluster IN $cluster

widgets.title: P95 Latency by Destination Service

widgets.description: Share of requests by destination service.

filter.expression: reporter = 'destination' AND destination_service_name EXISTS AND k8s.namespace.name IN $namespace AND service.name IN $service.name AND destination_cluster IN $cluster

widgets.title: Request Distribution

widgets.description: Envoy upstream retry and timeout rate.

filter.expression: cluster_name EXISTS
cluster_name EXISTS

widgets.title: Retries and Timeouts

widgets.description: Open Envoy circuit breakers by class.

filter.expression: cluster_name EXISTS
cluster_name EXISTS
cluster_name EXISTS

widgets.title: Circuit Breakers Open

widgets.description: Overall request latency percentiles.

filter.expression: reporter = 'destination' AND k8s.namespace.name IN $namespace AND service.name IN $service.name AND destination_cluster IN $cluster
reporter = 'destination' AND k8s.namespace.name IN $namespace AND service.name IN $service.name AND destination_cluster IN $cluster
reporter = 'destination' AND k8s.namespace.name IN $namespace AND service.name IN $service.name AND destination_cluster IN $cluster

widgets.title: Latency Percentiles

widgets.description: P95 request and response payload size.

filter.expression: reporter = 'destination' AND k8s.namespace.name IN $namespace AND service.name IN $service.name AND destination_cluster IN $cluster
reporter = 'destination' AND k8s.namespace.name IN $namespace AND service.name IN $service.name AND destination_cluster IN $cluster

widgets.title: Payload Size P95

widgets.description: TCP bytes sent and received by destination service.

filter.expression: reporter = 'destination' AND destination_service_name EXISTS AND k8s.namespace.name IN $namespace AND service.name IN $service.name AND destination_cluster IN $cluster
reporter = 'destination' AND destination_service_name EXISTS AND k8s.namespace.name IN $namespace AND service.name IN $service.name AND destination_cluster IN $cluster

widgets.title: TCP Throughput

widgets.description: HTTP 4xx/5xx percentage grouped by destination service.

filter.expression: reporter = 'destination' AND response_code REGEXP '^[45][0-9][0-9]$' AND destination_service_name EXISTS AND k8s.namespace.name IN $namespace AND service.name IN $service.name AND destination_cluster IN $cluster
reporter = 'destination' AND destination_service_name EXISTS AND k8s.namespace.name IN $namespace AND service.name IN $service.name AND destination_cluster IN $cluster

widgets.title: Error Rate by Service

widgets.description: HTTP error request rate grouped by response code.

filter.expression: reporter = 'destination' AND response_code REGEXP '^[45][0-9][0-9]$' AND k8s.namespace.name IN $namespace AND service.name IN $service.name AND destination_cluster IN $cluster

widgets.title: HTTP Errors by Code

widgets.description: Request rate grouped by Envoy/Istio response flags.

filter.expression: reporter = 'destination' AND response_flags EXISTS AND k8s.namespace.name IN $namespace AND service.name IN $service.name AND destination_cluster IN $cluster

widgets.title: Response Flags

widgets.description: Connected endpoints using XDS.
widgets.title: XDS Connections

widgets.description: Clusters managed by Istiod.
widgets.title: Managed Clusters

widgets.description: XDS pushes grouped by type.

filter.expression: type EXISTS

widgets.title: XDS Pushes

widgets.description: P95 XDS push/send latency.
widgets.title: XDS Push Latency P95

widgets.description: Known Pilot configuration conflict gauges.
widgets.title: Configuration Conflicts

widgets.description: Envoy upstream active connections by cluster.

filter.expression: cluster_name EXISTS

widgets.title: Envoy Active Connections

widgets.description: Envoy upstream request rate by cluster.

filter.expression: cluster_name EXISTS

widgets.title: Envoy Upstream Requests

widgets.description: Connection termination and connect failure rate.

filter.expression: cluster_name EXISTS

widgets.title: Connection Errors

widgets.description: Request rate grouped by Istio connection security policy.

filter.expression: reporter = 'destination' AND connection_security_policy EXISTS AND k8s.namespace.name IN $namespace AND service.name IN $service.name AND destination_cluster IN $cluster

widgets.title: mTLS Usage

widgets.description: Seconds until Istio workload certificate expiry.

filter.expression: k8s.namespace.name IN $namespace AND resource_name EXISTS

widgets.title: Workload Certificate Expiry

widgets.description: Citadel CSR received and successful certificate issuance rate.
widgets.title: Citadel CSR & Issuance Rate

widgets.description: Seconds until the Citadel root certificate expires. Negative value means already expired.
widgets.title: Root Certificate Expiry

widgets.description: Total services known to Istiod pilot.
widgets.title: Total Services

widgets.description: Total virtual services known to Istiod pilot.
widgets.title: Total Virtual Services

widgets.description: P95 time for a proxy to receive all required configuration after a config change.
widgets.title: Proxy Convergence Time P95
